meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Template to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use the Antigravity project template to overcome the no-portfolio trap. A professional guide for founders to ship SaaS products faster.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a growth ceiling for founders. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you can rapidly scaffold production-grade SaaS applications. This allows you to showcase live, functional revenue-generating tools rather than static code, proving your execution capability to potential clients and investors instantly.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, the market is moving fast, and your lack of a formal portfolio is killing your conversion rate. Every day you spend 'building' without a live product is a day your competitors capture your potential market share. The gap between an idea and a shipped, profitable SaaS is often just a lack of architectural momentum.

Enter the Antigravity project template. This isn't just boilerplate; it’s a high-velocity framework designed to bridge the gap between 'founder with an idea' and 'founder with a product.' By integrating this with Claude Code, you shift from manual coding to intelligent orchestration, turning hours of configuration into minutes of deployment.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize your project structure using the Antigravity template to ensure enterprise-grade folder organization and dependency management from the first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a robust SaaS starter project including authentication, database integration, and Stripe API hooks using the Antigravity base template.

steps.title: Define the Business Logic
steps.description: Translate your core value proposition into actionable code by defining your database schema and API endpoints within the Antigravity framework.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a database schema for a subscription-based SaaS product, including users, projects, and billing tables, following best practices for PostgreSQL.

steps.title: Implement High-Velocity UI
steps.description: Use the built-in component library to build a high-converting landing page and dashboard that looks like it cost $50k to develop.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive dashboard layout with a sidebar, stat cards, and a data table using Tailwind CSS and the Antigravity UI components.

steps.title: Integrate External APIs
steps.description: Connect your product to real-world services like Stripe or OpenAI to prove your app has tangible utility.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the Stripe webhook handler and integrate the OpenAI API for the core product feature as defined in the project roadmap.

steps.title: Ship to Production
steps.description: Automate your deployment pipeline so your portfolio is live, accessible, and ready for your first customer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Setup a CI/CD pipeline using the Antigravity deployment script that pushes to Vercel/Fly.io and runs automated smoke tests.

pro_tips: Always build your MVP around a single core feature; bloat kills early-stage SaaS projects faster than bugs.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your authentication flow; it builds instant trust with enterprise clients.
Keep your database schema lean; optimize for speed of iteration rather than premature scalability.
Document your architectural decisions in a README.md file; it turns your code into a professional case study for investors.
Automate your feedback loop by integrating a simple 'contact us' form that emails your primary business address.
content.next_steps: Once your project is live, treat it as a living entity. Monitor your logs for 48 hours, fix critical bugs, and then share your live URL on LinkedIn and Twitter to validate your product-market fit.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in the dark and start shipping to your target market. Your portfolio is your leverage, and your code is your currency. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
